rubric_content.text_property: When the user asks for durable short-video production, the agent uses the run_short_video_production tool instead of manually chaining video, TTS, or media expert tools.

When the user asks for product-ad short-video generation and has not explicitly approved the asset plan, the agent does not call raw video or TTS generation tools before the production tool returns a user review state.
When the user asks about current short-video production state, intermediate plans, events, timeline, or artifacts, the agent uses run_short_video_production with a read-only production view action.

When the user asks what would happen if they change a specific short-video shot, voiceover, plan item, timeline, or final output, the agent uses run_short_video_production with analyze_revision_impact before applying the change.
